articles.title: AI Can Now Write Your Emails
articles.summary: New AI tool helps write emails for you. It learns your style. You can send messages faster.
articles.impact: This can save lots of time for busy people.

articles.title: Faster Chip for Gaming Released
articles.summary: A new computer chip is out now. It makes games run much smoother. Gamers will love this upgrade.
articles.impact: Playing video games will be more fun and look better.

articles.title: App Update Fixes Annoying Bugs
articles.summary: Your favorite app got an update. It fixes problems you may have had. Things should work better now.
articles.impact: Using the app will be less frustrating and more reliable.

articles.title: Hackers Target Small Businesses
articles.summary: Cyber attackers are focusing on small shops. They want their customer data. Be careful with your info online.
articles.impact: Small businesses and their customers need to be extra careful online.

articles.title: New Robot Explores Mars
articles.summary: A new robot is exploring Mars now. It looks for signs of life. Scientists hope for new discoveries.
articles.impact: This mission could teach us if life exists elsewhere in space.
